SELECT COUNT(*) FROM title_basics tb, title_principals tp WHERE tb.tconst = tp.tconst AND tp.ordering < 3
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM title_principals tp, name_basics nb WHERE tp.nconst = nb.nconst AND nb.birthyear < 1980
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM title_ratings tr, title_basics tb WHERE tr.tconst = tb.tconst AND tb.runtimeMinutes > 180
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM title_basics tb WHERE tb.startYear > 2000 AND tb.runtimeMinutes < 120
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM title_basics tb, title_principals tp, name_basics nb WHERE tb.tconst = tp.tconst AND tp.nconst = nb.nconst AND nb.birthyear > 1950
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM title_ratings tr, title_basics tb WHERE tr.tconst = tb.tconst AND tr.num_votes > 5000
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM title_ratings tr, title_basics tb WHERE tr.tconst = tb.tconst AND tr.average_rating < 8.0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM title_basics tb, title_ratings tr WHERE tb.tconst = tr.tconst AND tr.average_rating > 9.0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM title_basics tb, title_ratings tr WHERE tb.tconst = tr.tconst AND tr.num_votes < 500
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM title_basics tb WHERE tb.startYear > 2000 AND tb.runtimeMinutes < 120
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM title_ratings tr WHERE tr.average_rating > 8.5
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM title_ratings tr WHERE tr.num_votes < 50
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM title_principals tp WHERE tp.ordering > 50
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM name_basics nb WHERE nb.birthyear > 1980
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM title_principals tp WHERE tp.ordering < 50
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM title_basics tb, title_principals tp, name_basics nb WHERE tb.tconst = tp.tconst AND tp.nconst = nb.nconst AND tb.startYear > 1990
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM title_basics tb, title_principals tp, name_basics nb WHERE tb.tconst = tp.tconst AND tp.nconst = nb.nconst AND tb.startYear < 1980
